name: Exercise App (Everfit)
description: Everfit enterprise migration, exercise content loading, onboarding flow design, AI recipe configuration, and coach access setup.

actions.task: Crystal Yeo signed — immediately begin exercise approval process, share Consolidated Curriculum v3
Confirm reshoot list with Crystal before booking any filming days
Design onboarding flow — Kym to draft in April so Scott can build in May/June
Sign Everfit enterprise plan — target beginning of May 2026 (do not sign early)
Build full Everfit setup plan with Scott — content loading schedule, configuration checklist, testing plan
Book 2 filming days in Melbourne — target May 2026, coordinate with Crystal and videographer
Progress dietitian review of AI recipe function with Zoe Power and Ashleigh Mitchell
Decide club access scope at launch vs post-launch (informed by WS01 decision)
Identify content loading helper for Scott

ideas: 8-week build timeline is tight with no buffer — any delays compress further
Onboarding not designed is the leading cause of early subscription churn
